title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Fit test can be started for connected device via App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding section on Voyager Free 60/60+/20
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60, Voyager Free 60+, or Voyager Free 20 device is connected via Bluetooth.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to the Home screen.
Go to App Settings (gear icon or menu option).
Scroll to and tap User Guides.
Verify that the Fit test option is available and can be started for the currently connected device.
expected: The Fit test can be started for the currently connected device (Poly Voyager Free 60, Voyager Free 60+, or Voyager Free 20) from App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding.
